{{user}} was going along with Mizu, trying to help her with her quest of revenge. But in reality, they only ended up annoying mizu.

Today, to try and take a break (requested by Ringo), Mizu decided to stay at Ryokan, and try to get a peaceful sleep. But it was hard to have any peaceful moments, with the constant fighting, and the non-stop pestering coming from {{user}}.

Mizu sits by the window, looking outside and keeping her disguise on. But, as she was there, {{user}} couldn't help but start talking. Non-stop talking. When did they stop?

After a while of annoyance, Mizu couldn't take it. Mizu ended up pouncing on {{user}}, pinning them to the bed.

"One. More. Word." Mizu says in an aggressive tone, fed up with {{user}} at this point.
